# 2026-02-01 15:29:35Z

<!-- copilotide Session bec114eb-5bfe-4271-aa19-dafbdd893c60 (2026-02-01 15:29:35Z) -->

_**User (2026-02-01 15:29:35Z)**_

tôi vừa sửa database bên my sql hãy fix lỗi cho tôi bên codeCREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS RMS_System;
USE RMS_System;

-- 1. Users: Người dùng hệ thống [cite: 7]
CREATE TABLE Users (
    UserID INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    Username VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    PasswordHash VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    FullName VARCHAR(100),
    Email VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE,
    Phone VARCHAR(20),
    Role ENUM('Admin', 'RestaurantOwner', 'BranchManager', 'Staff') NOT NULL,
    Status ENUM('Active', 'Inactive') DEFAULT 'Active',
    CreatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- 2. ServicePackages: Gói dịch vụ Platform [cite: 7]
CREATE TABLE ServicePackages (
    PackageID INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    PackageName VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    Price DECIMAL(15, 2) NOT NULL,
    Duration INT COMMENT 'Số ngày',
    FeaturesDescription TEXT,
    IsActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE
);

-- 4. RegistrationRequests: Đơn đăng ký hộ kinh doanh [cite: 8]
CREATE TABLE RegistrationRequests (
    RequestID INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    OwnerName VARCHAR(100),
    ContactInfo VARCHAR(255),
    RestaurantName VARCHAR(255),
    SubmissionDate TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    ApprovalStatus ENUM('Pending', 'Approved', 'Rejected') DEFAULT 'Pending',
    AdminNote TEXT
);

-- 5. Restaurants: Thông tin nhà hàng/chuỗi [cite: 8, 9]
CREATE TABLE Restaurants (
    RestaurantID INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    OwnerUserID INT,
    Name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    Logo VARCHAR(255),
    Description TEXT,
    TaxCode VARCHAR(50),
    Website VARCHAR(255),
    FOREIGN KEY (OwnerUserID) REFERENCES Users(UserID) ON DELETE SET NULL
);

-- 3. Subscriptions: Lịch sử thuê gói của nhà hàng [cite: 7, 8]
CREATE TABLE Subscriptions (
    SubscriptionID INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    RestaurantID INT,
    PackageID INT,
    StartDate DATETIME,
    EndDate DATETIME,
    Status ENUM('Active', 'Expired') DEFAULT 'Active',
    AutoRenew BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    FOREIGN KEY (RestaurantID) REFERENCES Restaurants(RestaurantID),
    FOREIGN KEY (PackageID) REFERENCES ServicePackages(PackageID)
);

-- 6. Branches: Chi nhánh nhà hàng [cite: 9]
CREATE TABLE Branches (
    BranchID INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    RestaurantID INT,
    ManagerUserID INT,
    Name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    Address VARCHAR(255),
    Phone VARCHAR(20),
    OpeningHours VARCHAR(100),
    IsActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
    FOREIGN KEY (RestaurantID) REFERENCES Restaurants(RestaurantID) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    FOREIGN KEY (ManagerUserID) REFERENCES Users(UserID) ON DELETE SET NULL
);

-- 7. Tables: Bàn ăn vật lý [cite: 9, 10]
CREATE TABLE Tables (
    TableID INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    BranchID INT,
    TableName VARCHAR(50),
    Capacity INT,
    Status ENUM('Available', 'Occupied', 'Reserved') DEFAULT 'Available',
    QRCode TEXT,
    FOREIGN KEY (BranchID) REFERENCES Branches(BranchID) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

-- 8. Categories: Danh mục món ăn [cite: 10]
CREATE TABLE Categories (
    CategoryID INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    RestaurantID INT,
    Name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    Description TEXT,
    DisplayOrder INT,
    FOREIGN KEY (RestaurantID) REFERENCES Restaurants(RestaurantID) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

-- 9. Products: Món ăn/Sản phẩm [cite: 10]
CREATE TABLE Products (
    ProductID INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    CategoryID INT,
    Name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    Description TEXT,
    Price DECIMAL(15, 2) NOT NULL,
    ImageURL VARCHAR(255),
    Status ENUM('Available', 'OutOfStock') DEFAULT 'Available',
    FOREIGN KEY (CategoryID) REFERENCES Categories(CategoryID) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

-- 10. Orders: Phiên gọi món [cite: 10, 11]
CREATE TABLE Orders (
    OrderID INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    BranchID INT,
    OrderTime TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    TotalAmount DECIMAL(15, 2) DEFAULT 0 COMMENT 'Tổng tiền tạm tính',
    OrderStatus ENUM('Pending', 'Processing', 'Completed', 'Cancelled') DEFAULT 'Pending',
    PaymentStatus ENUM('Unpaid', 'Paid') DEFAULT 'Unpaid',
    CustomerNote TEXT,
    FOREIGN KEY (BranchID) REFERENCES Branches(BranchID)
);

-- 11. OrderTables: Bảng trung gian xử lý GHÉP BÀN [cite: 11]
CREATE TABLE OrderTables (
    OrderID INT,
    TableID INT,
    PRIMARY KEY (OrderID, TableID),
    FOREIGN KEY (OrderID) REFERENCES Orders(OrderID) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    FOREIGN KEY (TableID) REFERENCES Tables(TableID) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

-- 12. OrderDetails: Chi tiết các món [cite: 12]
CREATE TABLE OrderDetails (
    OrderDetailID INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    OrderID INT,
    ProductID INT,
    Quantity INT NOT NULL,
    UnitPrice DECIMAL(15, 2) NOT NULL,
    Note TEXT,
    ItemStatus ENUM('Pending', 'Served') DEFAULT 'Pending',
    FOREIGN KEY (OrderID) REFERENCES Orders(OrderID) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    FOREIGN KEY (ProductID) REFERENCES Products(ProductID)
);

-- 13. Discounts: Mã giảm giá [cite: 12, 13]
CREATE TABLE Discounts (
    DiscountID INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    RestaurantID INT,
    Code VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    DiscountType ENUM('Percentage', 'FixedAmount') NOT NULL,
    Value DECIMAL(15, 2) NOT NULL,
    MinOrderValue DECIMAL(15, 2) DEFAULT 0,
    StartDate DATETIME,
    EndDate DATETIME,
    FOREIGN KEY (RestaurantID) REFERENCES Restaurants(RestaurantID) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

-- 14. Invoices: Hóa đơn thanh toán [cite: 13]
CREATE TABLE Invoices (
    InvoiceID INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    OrderID INT UNIQUE, -- Quan hệ 1:1 
    DiscountID INT,
    IssuedDate TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    SubTotal DECIMAL(15, 2) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Tiền trước giảm',
    DiscountAmount DECIMAL(15, 2) DEFAULT 0,
    TotalAmount DECIMAL(15, 2) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Tiền khách phải trả',
    CustomerTaxName VARCHAR(255),
    CustomerTaxCode VARCHAR(50),
    InvoiceFileURL VARCHAR(255),
    FOREIGN KEY (OrderID) REFERENCES Orders(OrderID),
    FOREIGN KEY (DiscountID) REFERENCES Discounts(DiscountID)
);

-- 15. Transactions: Giao dịch tiền tệ [cite: 14]
CREATE TABLE Transactions (
    TransactionID INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    InvoiceID INT,
    PaymentGatewayRef VARCHAR(255),
    Amount DECIMAL(15, 2) NOT NULL,
    PaymentMethod ENUM('Cash', 'BankTransfer', 'E-Wallet') NOT NULL,
    Status ENUM('Success', 'Failed') DEFAULT 'Success',
    TransactionTime TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (InvoiceID) REFERENCES Invoices(InvoiceID)
);

-- 16. ServiceRequests: Yêu cầu tại bàn [cite: 14]
CREATE TABLE ServiceRequests (
    RequestID INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    BranchID INT,
    TableID INT,
    RequestType ENUM('Gọi món', 'Gọi nước', 'Thanh toán', 'Khác') NOT NULL,
    Status VARCHAR(50),
    CreatedTime TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (BranchID) REFERENCES Branches(BranchID),
    FOREIGN KEY (TableID) REFERENCES Tables(TableID)
);

-- 17. SupportTickets: Báo lỗi tới Admin [cite: 15]
CREATE TABLE SupportTickets (
    TicketID INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    UserID INT,
    Subject VARCHAR(255),
    Description TEXT,
    Priority ENUM('Low', 'Medium', 'High') DEFAULT 'Medium',
    Status VARCHAR(50),
    Resolution TEXT,
    CreatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (UserID) REFERENCES Users(UserID)
);

---

```
*** Update File: backend/controllers/authController.js

-import bcrypt from "bcrypt";
-import jwt from "jsonwebtoken";
-import { db } from "../config/db.js";
-
-const JWT_SECRET = process.env.JWT_SECRET || "secret_key_dev";

-/* ================= REGISTER ================= */
-export const register = async (req, res) => {
-  try {
-    const { fullName, email, password, phone, role } = req.body;
-
-    // Check email
-    const [exist] = await db.query(
-      "SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = ?",
-      [email]
-    );
-    if (exist.length > 0) {

-      "SELECT id FROM roles WHERE role_name = ?",

-      return res.status(400).json({ message: "Role không hợp lệ" });
-    }
-

-    await db.query(
-      `INSERT INTO users (full_name, email, password_hash, phone, role_id)
-       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
-      [fullName, email, passwordHash, phone, roles[0].id]
-    );
-
-    res.status(201).json({ message: "Đăng ký thành công" });
-  } catch (err) {
-    console.error(err);
-    res.status(500).json({ message: "Lỗi server" });
-  }
-};
-
-/* ================= LOGIN ================= */
-export const login = async (req, res) => {
-  try {
-    const { email, password } = req.body;
-
-    const [users] = await db.query(
-      `SELECT u.id, u.full_name, u.email, u.password_hash, r.role_name
-       FROM users u
-       JOIN roles r ON u.role_id = r.id
-       WHERE u.email = ?`,
-      [email]
-    );
-
-    if (users.length === 0) {
-      return res.status(401).json({
-        message: "Email hoặc mật khẩu không đúng",
-      });
-    }
-
-    const user = users[0];
-
-    const isMatch = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.password_hash);
-    if (!isMatch) {
-      return res.status(401).json({
-        message: "Email hoặc mật khẩu không đúng",

-      {

-        role: user.role_name,

-      message: "Đăng nhập thành công",
-      token,
-      user: {
-        id: user.id,
-        fullName: user.full_name,
-        email: user.email,
-        role: user.role_name,

-    console.error(error);
-    res.status(500).json({ message: "Lỗi server" });
-  }
-};
+import bcrypt from "bcrypt";
+import jwt from "jsonwebtoken";
+import { db } from "../config/db.js";
+
+const JWT_SECRET = process.env.JWT_SECRET || "secret_key_dev";
+
+/* ================= REGISTER (adjusted to new schema) ================= */
+export const register = async (req, res) => {
+  try {
+    const { fullName, email, password, phone, role, username } = req.body;
+
+    // Check email
+    const [exist] = await db.query(
+      "SELECT UserID FROM Users WHERE Email = ?",
+      [email]
+    );
+    if (exist.length > 0) {
+      return res.status(400).json({ message: "Email đã tồn tại" });
+    }
+
+    // Hash password
+    const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(password, 10);
+
+    await db.query(
+      `INSERT INTO Users (Username, FullName, Email, PasswordHash, Phone, Role)
+       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
+      [username || null, fullName, email, passwordHash, phone || null, role || 'Staff']
+    );
+
+    res.status(201).json({ message: "Đăng ký thành công" });
+  } catch (err) {
+    console.error(err);
+    res.status(500).json({ message: "Lỗi server" });
+  }
+};
+
+/* ================= LOGIN (adjusted to new schema) ================= */
+export const login = async (req, res) => {
+  try {
+    const { email, password } = req.body;
+
+    const [users] = await db.query(
+      `SELECT UserID, FullName, Email, PasswordHash, Role
+       FROM Users
+       WHERE Email = ?`,
+      [email]
+    );
+
+    if (users.length === 0) {
+      return res.status(401).json({
+        message: "Email hoặc mật khẩu không đúng",
+      });
+    }
+
+    const user = users[0];
+
+    const isMatch = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.PasswordHash);
+    if (!isMatch) {
+      return res.status(401).json({
+        message: "Email hoặc mật khẩu không đúng",
+      });
+    }
+
+    const token = jwt.sign(
+      {
+        userId: user.UserID,
+        role: user.Role,
+      },
+      JWT_SECRET,
+      { expiresIn: "7d" }
+    );
+
+    return res.json({
+      message: "Đăng nhập thành công",
+      token,
+      user: {
+        id: user.UserID,
+        fullName: user.FullName,
+        email: user.Email,
+        role: user.Role,
+      },
+    });
+  } catch (error) {
+    console.error(error);
+    res.status(500).json({ message: "Lỗi server" });
+  }
+};
*** End Patch
```


</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (copilot/auto)**_

```
-import bcrypt from "bcrypt";
-import jwt from "jsonwebtoken";
-import { db } from "../config/db.js";
-
-const JWT_SECRET = process.env.JWT_SECRET || "secret_key_dev";

-    const { fullName, email, password, phone, role } = req.body;

-    // Check email

-      "SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = ?",
-      [email]
-    );

-      [role]

-    }

-       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
-      [fullName, email, passwordHash, phone, roles[0].id]

-
-    res.status(201).json({ message: "Đăng ký thành công" });
-  } catch (err) {
-    console.error(err);

-  }

-/* ================= LOGIN ================= */
-export const login = async (req, res) => {
-  try {
-    const { email, password } = req.body;
-
-    const [users] = await db.query(
-      `SELECT u.id, u.full_name, u.email, u.password_hash, r.role_name
-       FROM users u
-       JOIN roles r ON u.role_id = r.id
-       WHERE u.email = ?`,
-      [email]

-      {

+import bcrypt from "bcrypt";
+import jwt from "jsonwebtoken";
+import { db } from "../config/db.js";
+
+const JWT_SECRET = process.env.JWT_SECRET || "secret_key_dev";
+
+/* ================= REGISTER (adjusted to new schema) ================= */
+export const register = async (req, res) => {
+  try {
+    const { fullName, email, password, phone, role, username } = req.body;
+
+    // Check email
+    const [exist] = await db.query(
+      "SELECT UserID FROM Users WHERE Email = ?",
+      [email]
+    );
+    if (exist.length > 0) {
+      return res.status(400).json({ message: "Email đã tồn tại" });
+    }
+
+    // Hash password
+    const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(password, 10);
+
+    await db.query(
+      `INSERT INTO Users (Username, FullName, Email, PasswordHash, Phone, Role)
+       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
+      [username || null, fullName, email, passwordHash, phone || null, role || 'Staff']
+    );
+
+    res.status(201).json({ message: "Đăng ký thành công" });
+  } catch (err) {
+    console.error(err);
+    res.status(500).json({ message: "Lỗi server" });
+  }
+};
+
+/* ================= LOGIN (adjusted to new schema) ================= */
+export const login = async (req, res) => {
+  try {
+    const { email, password } = req.body;
+
+    const [users] = await db.query(
+      `SELECT UserID, FullName, Email, PasswordHash, Role
+       FROM Users
+       WHERE Email = ?`,
+      [email]
+    );
+
+    if (users.length === 0) {
+      return res.status(401).json({
+        message: "Email hoặc mật khẩu không đúng",
+      });
+    }
+
+    const user = users[0];
+
+    const isMatch = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.PasswordHash);
+    if (!isMatch) {
+      return res.status(401).json({
+        message: "Email hoặc mật khẩu không đúng",
+      });
+    }
+
+    const token = jwt.sign(
+      {
+        userId: user.UserID,
+        role: user.Role,
+      },
+      JWT_SECRET,
+      { expiresIn: "7d" }
+    );
+
+    return res.json({
+      message: "Đăng nhập thành công",
+      token,
+      user: {
+        id: user.UserID,
+        fullName: user.FullName,
+        email: user.Email,
+        role: user.Role,
+      },
+    });
+  } catch (error) {
+    console.error(error);
+    res.status(500).json({ message: "Lỗi server" });
+  }
+};
*** End Patch
```

```
+import bcrypt from "bcrypt";
+import jwt from "jsonwebtoken";
+import { db } from "../config/db.js";
+
+const JWT_SECRET = process.env.JWT_SECRET || "secret_key_dev";
+
+/* ================= REGISTER (adjusted to new schema) ================= */
+export const register = async (req, res) => {
+  try {
+    const { fullName, email, password, phone, role, username } = req.body;
+
+    // Check email
+    const [exist] = await db.query(
+      "SELECT UserID FROM Users WHERE Email = ?",
+      [email]
+    );
+    if (exist.length > 0) {
+      return res.status(400).json({ message: "Email đã tồn tại" });
+    }
+
+    // Hash password
+    const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(password, 10);
+
+    await db.query(
+      `INSERT INTO Users (Username, FullName, Email, PasswordHash, Phone, Role)
+       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
+      [username || null, fullName, email, passwordHash, phone || null, role || 'Staff']
+    );
+
+    res.status(201).json({ message: "Đăng ký thành công" });
+  } catch (err) {
+    console.error(err);
+    res.status(500).json({ message: "Lỗi server" });
+  }
+};
+
+/* ================= LOGIN (adjusted to new schema) ================= */
+export const login = async (req, res) => {
+  try {
+    const { email, password } = req.body;
+
+    const [users] = await db.query(
+      `SELECT UserID, FullName, Email, PasswordHash, Role
+       FROM Users
+       WHERE Email = ?`,
+      [email]
+    );
+
+    if (users.length === 0) {
+      return res.status(401).json({
+        message: "Email hoặc mật khẩu không đúng",
+      });
+    }
+
+    const user = users[0];
+
+    const isMatch = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.PasswordHash);
+    if (!isMatch) {
+      return res.status(401).json({
+        message: "Email hoặc mật khẩu không đúng",
+      });
+    }
+
+    const token = jwt.sign(
+      {
+        userId: user.UserID,
+        role: user.Role,
+      },
+      JWT_SECRET,
+      { expiresIn: "7d" }
+    );
+
+    return res.json({
+      message: "Đăng nhập thành công",
+      token,
+      user: {
+        id: user.UserID,
+        fullName: user.FullName,
+        email: user.Email,
+        role: user.Role,
+      },
+    });
+  } catch (error) {
+    console.error(error);
+    res.status(500).json({ message: "Lỗi server" });
+  }
+};
*** End Patch
```


</details></tool-use>
